# Assessment Overview

This directory contains the supplementary assessment documents that were generated for report eport-20260609101639. Use the links below as the entry point for architecture, dependency, API, data, configuration, and workflow details.

| Document | Description |
|---|---|
| [Architecture Diagram](./architecture-diagram.md) | High-level runtime architecture and detailed component relationship diagrams for the MVC site and data loader. |
| [Dependency Map](./dependency-map.md) | Functional grouping of declared package dependencies with compatibility observations. |
| [API & Service Communication Contracts](./api-service-contracts.md) | Inventory of MVC endpoints, DTOs, and the synchronous request flow into Azure Cognitive Search. |
| [Data Architecture & Persistence Layer](./data-architecture.md) | Best-effort description of the Azure Cognitive Search-backed persistence model, repository methods, and data boundaries. |
| [Configuration & Externalized Settings Inventory](./configuration-inventory.md) | Catalog of configuration files, build/runtime settings, masked secrets, and framework versions. |
| [Core Business Workflows](./business-workflows.md) | Business-centric summary of job-search, suggestion, lookup, and index-provisioning workflows. |
